chart_type_note: This is a Liu Yao (六爻) Na Jia reference table, NOT a Qi Men Dun Jia nine-palace chart. It contains the Ganzhi (干支 Heavenly Stem + Earthly Branch) assignments for each of the six yao lines across the 10 Heavenly Stems.

chart_meta.title: 六爻纳甲参考表 (Liu Yao Na Jia Reference Table)
chart_meta.system: 六爻 (Liu Yao / Six Lines Divination)
chart_meta.purpose: Na Jia (纳甲) — assignment of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches to the six yao lines of a hexagram

二爻.description: Merchant — wealthy, intelligent, business-minded, emotionally intelligent

cooperation_rules.raw: 六爻找三爻，三爻找六爻，五找二，二找五，四找一，一找四

governance_cycle.rule: Each yao governs the next in descending order, with 一爻 cycling back to govern 六爻
governance_cycle.raw: 六爻治五爻，五爻治四爻，四爻治三爻，三爻治二爻，二爻治一爻，一爻治六爻

_meta.note: Image identified as Liu Yao Na Jia table. Task originally requested QMDJ extraction — image does not contain a QMDJ nine-palace grid.
